title: oxalis enneaphylla
intro: Oxalis enneaphylla, also known as the nine-leaved sorrel or mountain rose, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional South American medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oxalis enneaphylla include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and cardiovascular disease. Oxalis enneaphylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as capsules and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
